title: Proliferation (BrdU), electrical resistance (ECIS) and Angiogenesis (Spheroid sprouting) of ECFC transfected with siRNA for KLRK1-AS1 and control siRNA
author: Hiden, Ursula
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: These are data generated for the study “Downregulation of the long non-coding RNA KLRK1-AS1 disturbs endothelial barrier integrity and promotes angiogenic sprouting,” submitted to Life, Section Physiology and Pathology.
steps_raw: These are data generated for the study “Downregulation of the long non-coding RNA KLRK1-AS1 disturbs endothelial barrier integrity and promotes angiogenic sprouting,” submitted to Life, Section Physiology and Pathology.
